title: Verify Internal Controller Voltage On VISU_IO_DIAG Screen
summary: Check the Operator Station HMI VISU_IO_DIAG screen and verify whether the internal controller voltage shown in the "Voltage Levels" section matches the documented expected value of 24 V.
when_to_use: Use this procedure when troubleshooting from the Operator Station HMI and you need to verify the internal controller voltage shown on the read-only VISU_IO_DIAG screen.
not_for: Do not use this procedure to change settings or adjust voltage values; the VISU_IO_DIAG screen is described as read-only.
Do not use this procedure as a corrective action procedure for voltage faults; the source only supports verification of the displayed value.

roles_and_responsibilities.responsibility: Open the VISU_IO_DIAG screen, inspect the Voltage Levels section, compare the displayed internal controller voltage to 24 V, and record the result.

safety_notes: The VISU_IO_DIAG screen is read-only and can be used for troubleshooting.
access_or_tools_needed: Access to the Operator Station HMI

access_required: Access to the Operator Station HMI
system_preconditions: The Operator Station HMI must be available for viewing.
The VISU_IO_DIAG screen must be accessible.
external_references: Figure 4-27, Operator Station IO Diagnostics Screen

visual_references.description: Operator Station IO Diagnostics screen showing the read-only VISU_IO_DIAG view used for troubleshooting, including the Voltage Levels section.

steps.title: Open the VISU_IO_DIAG screen
steps.purpose: Access the read-only diagnostics screen used for troubleshooting.
steps.instruction: Open the VISU_IO_DIAG screen on the Operator Station HMI.
steps.expected_result: The VISU_IO_DIAG screen is displayed on the Operator Station HMI.
steps.healthy_condition: The read-only IO diagnostics screen is visible and available for troubleshooting.
steps.failure_condition: The VISU_IO_DIAG screen cannot be opened or viewed.

actions.label: Open VISU_IO_DIAG
actions.exact_action: Open the VISU_IO_DIAG screen on the Operator Station HMI.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Read-only Operator Station IO Diagnostics screen used for troubleshooting.

stop_or_escalate_if: The VISU_IO_DIAG screen is not accessible on the Operator Station HMI.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: NOTE: This screen is read-only and can be used for troubleshooting.

steps.title: Locate the Voltage Levels section
steps.purpose: Find the screen area that displays the internal controller voltage reading.
steps.instruction: Locate the "Voltage Levels" section on the VISU_IO_DIAG screen.
steps.expected_result: The "Voltage Levels" section is identified on the screen.
steps.healthy_condition: The "Voltage Levels" section is visible and readable.
steps.failure_condition: The "Voltage Levels" section is not visible or cannot be identified.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: The area of the VISU_IO_DIAG screen labeled "Voltage Levels".

stop_or_escalate_if: The "Voltage Levels" section is not visible on the VISU_IO_DIAG screen.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Item 3: The "Voltage Levels" section provides the voltage readings of the internal controller of the HMI. These should be 24 V.

steps.title: Observe the internal controller voltage reading
steps.purpose: Read the displayed voltage value for the HMI internal controller.
steps.instruction: Observe the voltage reading for the internal controller of the HMI in the "Voltage Levels" section.
steps.expected_result: A displayed voltage value for the HMI internal controller is visible.
steps.healthy_condition: The internal controller voltage value is visible and readable on the screen.
steps.failure_condition: The voltage value is not visible or cannot be read.

actions.label: Read internal controller voltage
actions.exact_action: Observe the voltage reading for the internal controller of the HMI.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: The displayed internal controller voltage reading within the "Voltage Levels" section.

stop_or_escalate_if: The voltage value is not visible on the screen.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: The "Voltage Levels" section provides the voltage readings of the internal controller of the HMI.

steps.title: Compare the displayed reading to 24 V
steps.purpose: Determine whether the displayed internal controller voltage matches the documented expected value.
steps.instruction: Compare the displayed internal controller voltage reading to the documented expected value of 24 V.
steps.expected_result: You determine whether the displayed voltage matches 24 V.
steps.healthy_condition: The displayed internal controller voltage matches 24 V.
steps.failure_condition: The displayed internal controller voltage does not match 24 V.

actions.label: Compare reading to expected value
actions.exact_action: Compare the displayed reading to the documented expected value of 24 V.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: The internal controller voltage reading in the "Voltage Levels" section and whether it matches 24 V.

stop_or_escalate_if: The displayed internal controller voltage does not match 24 V.

steps.title: Record the verification result
steps.purpose: Capture whether the displayed voltage matches the documented expected value.
steps.instruction: Record whether the displayed voltage matches 24 V.
steps.expected_result: The verification result is documented as either matching or not matching 24 V.
steps.healthy_condition: The result is clearly recorded and indicates whether the displayed value matches 24 V.
steps.failure_condition: The result cannot be determined because the value was not visible or readable.

actions.label: Document result
actions.exact_action: Record whether the displayed voltage matches 24 V.

stop_or_escalate_if: The voltage value could not be determined from the screen.
The displayed internal controller voltage does not match 24 V.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: The "Voltage Levels" section provides the voltage readings of the internal controller of the HMI. These should be 24 V.

success_criteria: The VISU_IO_DIAG screen is opened successfully.
The internal controller voltage reading is visible.
The displayed reading is compared against the documented expected value of 24 V.
healthy_conditions: The VISU_IO_DIAG screen is available for read-only troubleshooting.
The internal controller voltage reading is visible and readable.
The displayed internal controller voltage matches 24 V.
failure_conditions: The VISU_IO_DIAG screen cannot be accessed.
The "Voltage Levels" section is not visible.
The internal controller voltage value is not visible.
The displayed internal controller voltage does not match 24 V.
escalation_guidance: Escalate if the displayed internal controller voltage does not match 24 V.
Escalate if the voltage value is not visible on the screen.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: VISU_IO_DIAG read-only diagnostics screen, including the "Voltage Levels" section and internal controller voltage reading.
